description: Skill instructs Claude to run curl piped to bash for CLI installation. Claude executes this on the user's machine, downloading and running arbitrary remote code without integrity verification.
suggested_fix: Replace with pip install or brew install once packages are published; or add checksum verification before executing the downloaded script.

description: Identical curl-pipe-bash CLI install pattern in the self-hosted skill. Claude executes this during self-hosted setup, same risk surface as the cloud skill.
suggested_fix: Replace with pip install or brew install once packages are published; or add checksum verification before executing the downloaded script.

description: Uses shell=True to chain profile-create and daemon-start commands with &&. Arguments are pre-escaped via shlex.join() which mitigates injection risk, but shell=True remains a high-severity pattern if config values change.
suggested_fix: Refactor to run the two subprocess commands sequentially with shell=False, eliminating the need for && shell chaining.

description: Identical shell=True daemon pre-start pattern in the codex integration. Same shlex.join() mitigation and same refactoring recommendation applies.
suggested_fix: Refactor to run the two subprocess commands sequentially with shell=False.

description: npm prepare script runs setup-hooks.sh automatically on npm install. The script only sets core.hooksPath and is low-risk in content, but auto-executed install scripts are a supply-chain surface.
suggested_fix: Document the prepare script's behavior in CONTRIBUTING.md or move git-hook setup to an explicit post-clone step.

description: Hook script POSTs full conversation transcripts to the configured Hindsight API on every Stop event. Intentional functionality, but consumers should be aware conversation content leaves the local machine to hindsightApiUrl.
suggested_fix: Document data-flow clearly in plugin README; ensure users understand conversation content is transmitted to the configured API endpoint.

description: Hook commands use __SCRIPTS_DIR__ as a path prefix instead of a runtime-resolved variable like ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}. If deployed without install-time substitution, all codex hooks invoke non-existent paths and silently fail.
suggested_fix: Document the substitution mechanism in the codex integration README, or replace with a runtime-resolved variable consistent with the claude-code plugin pattern.

description: Five vague quantifiers in review criteria: 'significantly changed' (line 130), 'non-trivial' (lines 135, 148, 167), 'meaningful' (line 156). These leave review thresholds ambiguous.
suggested_fix: Replace with concrete criteria: e.g., 'any new function or class', 'functions with more than 10 LOC', 'test files with at least one assertion per logical branch'.

description: 'appropriate' used three times as a guidance qualifier (e.g., 'design a retrieval strategy appropriate for the application'). Leaves the decision criteria open-ended rather than offering named patterns.
suggested_fix: Replace with concrete options: 'use one of: (A) naming convention, (B) store ID in application database, (C) list all models and match by name prefix'.

description: 'non-trivial task' is a vague trigger for when to recall memories. Reader cannot determine the threshold without further judgment.
suggested_fix: Replace with examples: 'before writing code, modifying configuration, or answering technical questions about the codebase'.

description: Same 'non-trivial task' vague recall trigger as hindsight-cloud/SKILL.md line 133.
suggested_fix: Replace with concrete task examples as suggested for hindsight-cloud/SKILL.md.

description: Same 'non-trivial task' vague recall trigger repeated in the self-hosted variant.
suggested_fix: Replace with concrete task examples consistent across all three memory skill variants.

pattern: missing async, missing SessionEnd, template placeholder
description: Codex hooks.json lacks async:true on Stop hook (unlike claude-code which uses async+15s), uses 30s sync timeout instead, and is missing the SessionEnd hook entirely — meaning no guaranteed final retain on session close.
suggested_fix: Add async:true to Stop hook, add SessionEnd hook matching claude-code pattern, and document or resolve the __SCRIPTS_DIR__ placeholder.

description: Docs skill references references/ subdirectory (references/best-practices.md, references/developer/api/, etc.) which is auto-generated by scripts/generate-docs-skill.sh. Skill accuracy depends on the generator being run; stale docs reduce usefulness but no missing files detected in this audit.
suggested_fix: Add a note in SKILL.md header indicating the auto-generated nature and the command to refresh: 'Run ./scripts/generate-docs-skill.sh to update'.

description: Codex and claude-code integrations use different variable conventions for script paths: __SCRIPTS_DIR__ (install-time placeholder) vs ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} (runtime env var). This inconsistency increases maintenance burden and risk of misconfiguration.
suggested_fix: Standardize on one approach across integrations; document the chosen pattern in a shared integration authoring guide.
